title: ERP Pre-Sales Solution Consultant
description:
Job Summary:
serves as a consultant or pre-sales consultant in strategic customer projects, playing a key role in customer engagement and business development.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. Lead or participate in end-to-end solution design for strategic and large-scale projects, including industry solutions, technical architectures, and product-based solutions.
  2. Translate customer business needs into feasible, competitive, and scalable solution architectures, ensuring alignment with customer strategies and project goals.
  3. Drive solution planning and design activities during the project initiation stage, supporting project approval, scoping, and overall solution feasibility assessment.
  4. Prepare and deliver solution proposals, presentations, and pre-sales materials, and conduct solution workshops or executive-level briefings for customers.
  5. Work closely with internal product, delivery, and technical teams to ensure solution consistency, feasibility, and successful handover to delivery teams.
  6. Provide professional consulting input throughout the customer lifecycle, supporting long-term customer engagement and solution evolution.
  7. Conduct the ERP product demonstrations when needed.

Job Requirements:

  • Expertise in at least one ERP product, at least 5 years of experience across pre-sales, implementation, or consulting functions;
  • Proven experience in analyzing customer requirements, developing solutions, and managing pre-sales handover. Ability to provide professional support to the Delivery Manager (FR) during key phases such as blueprint design.
  • Candidates with experience as an Institutional Solution Director or with proven solution design experience for projects of a similar scale are preferred.
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
  • Fluency in English (spoken and written) is required, with Chinese reading and writing skills to communicate effectively with Chinese stakeholders.
  • Willing and able to travel as required to support business operations.

postedCompany.description: Kingdee Singapore is a branch of Kingdee International Software Group based in Singapore, as the international business center. Kingdee International Software Group Co., Ltd. is a listed company on the main board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (stock code: 00268). It is a globally renowned enterprise management cloud SaaS company, serving over 7.4 million customers. According to our business plan, Kingdee will rapidly expand its global market based in Singapore. In this pioneering period, we sincerely invite professionals with passion and dreams to join us and achieve brilliant success together.
postedCompany.name: KINGDEE INTERNATIONAL SOFTWARE GROUP (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
